problem_summary: Trace-class norm + higher cumulant traces as attention-head importance
sub_mechanisms: M_1 view per-head attention as trace-class operator
M_4 prune heads by joint quantile of trace moments
policy_consult_summary: mechanism_transfer × operator-algebras is untouched (cumulative 0). Up_weight_explore prioritizes this. spectral-allocation form is over-mined but novel domain class allows entry.
